verses.text: 'I am the true vine, and my Father is the husbandman'; He prunes the fruitful branch. Pruned for fruit. God trims His own that they may bear more.
'I am the true vine, and my Father is the husbandman'; He prunes the fruitful branch. Pruned for fruit. God trims His own that they may bear more.
'I am the true vine, and my Father is the husbandman'; He prunes the fruitful branch. Pruned for fruit. God trims His own that they may bear more.
'Abide in me, and I in you'; 'without me ye can do nothing'; the withered branch is burned. Vital union. Fruit comes only from staying joined to Christ.
'Abide in me, and I in you'; 'without me ye can do nothing'; the withered branch is burned. Vital union. Fruit comes only from staying joined to Christ.
'Abide in me, and I in you'; 'without me ye can do nothing'; the withered branch is burned. Vital union. Fruit comes only from staying joined to Christ.
If ye abide and My words abide in you, 'ye shall ask what ye will'; herein is the Father glorified. Fruitful prayer. The abiding soul prays and is heard.
If ye abide and My words abide in you, 'ye shall ask what ye will'; herein is the Father glorified. Fruitful prayer. The abiding soul prays and is heard.
Continue in My love; keep My commandments, 'that your joy might be full.' Joy in obedience. Abiding love brings overflowing joy.
Continue in My love; keep My commandments, 'that your joy might be full.' Joy in obedience. Abiding love brings overflowing joy.
Continue in My love; keep My commandments, 'that your joy might be full.' Joy in obedience. Abiding love brings overflowing joy.
'Greater love hath no man than this, that a man lay down his life for his friends.' Supreme love. Christ shows it in laying down His life.
'Greater love hath no man than this, that a man lay down his life for his friends.' Supreme love. Christ shows it in laying down His life.
'Greater love hath no man than this, that a man lay down his life for his friends.' Supreme love. Christ shows it in laying down His life.
'I have called you... friends'; ye have not chosen Me, but I you, to bring forth fruit. Chosen friends. His choosing, not ours, is the root of all.
'I have called you... friends'; ye have not chosen Me, but I you, to bring forth fruit. Chosen friends. His choosing, not ours, is the root of all.
'I have called you... friends'; ye have not chosen Me, but I you, to bring forth fruit. Chosen friends. His choosing, not ours, is the root of all.
If the world hate you, 'it hated me before it hated you'; the servant is not above his lord. Shared reproach. To follow Christ is to share His rejection.
If the world hate you, 'it hated me before it hated you'; the servant is not above his lord. Shared reproach. To follow Christ is to share His rejection.
If the world hate you, 'it hated me before it hated you'; the servant is not above his lord. Shared reproach. To follow Christ is to share His rejection.
If the world hate you, 'it hated me before it hated you'; the servant is not above his lord. Shared reproach. To follow Christ is to share His rejection.
They have 'no cloke for their sin'; 'they hated me without a cause.' Guilt exposed. Their hatred of Christ leaves them without excuse.
They have 'no cloke for their sin'; 'they hated me without a cause.' Guilt exposed. Their hatred of Christ leaves them without excuse.
They have 'no cloke for their sin'; 'they hated me without a cause.' Guilt exposed. Their hatred of Christ leaves them without excuse.
They have 'no cloke for their sin'; 'they hated me without a cause.' Guilt exposed. Their hatred of Christ leaves them without excuse.
The Comforter, the Spirit of truth, shall testify of Me, and ye also. Double witness. The Spirit and the disciples bear witness together.
